artPrompt: The sly instant of theft: a goblin's clawed fingers pinching a single warm coin from the top of an open cash drawer in a dim back room, a treasure stack glinting beside an open ledger, his other hand already pocketing the take. A lone amber lamp lights the coin and his sidelong grin, cigar smoke drifting through the surrounding ink-black gloom. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Skimming the Till
text: Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life for each opponent. Then create a Treasure token. The books will balance. The books always balance, eventually, with help.
flavorText: A little off the top of every transaction. Nobody misses what they never counted.
